parties submit encrypted prices. FHE.gte() determines if ceiling >= floor.      Neither party's price is ever visible on-chain. Only the match boolean and      the encrypted midpoint are made available for threshold decryption.      Includes on-chain invite system \u2014 no external messaging services needed.      Invites are stored on-chain, tied to wallet addresses.      Network: Base Sepolia (CoFHE-supported)      CoFHE Contracts: fhenixprotocol/cofhe-contracts      Decrypt Flow: decryptForView (UI) / decryptForTx + publishDecryptResult (on-chain)","kind":"dev","methods":{"createRoom(bytes32,(uint256,uint8,uint8,bytes),uint8,uint256)":{"params":{"deadline":"Unix timestamp after which room expires","encFloor":"InEuint64 \u2014 encrypted floor price","nType":"Negotiation type (0=M&A, 1=Salary, 2=RealEstate, 3=Custom)","roomId":"Unique room identifier (bytes32)"}},"getEncryptedResult(bytes32)":{"details":"Only callable by room parties. FHE.div(sum, euint64(2))     \u2014 midpoint in encrypted space   4. 3BGvqaihkQakFkQYpaS"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol":{"keccak256":"0x59973a93b1f983f94e10529f46ca46544a9fec2b5f56fb1390bbe9e0dc79f857","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c55ef8f0b9719790c2ae6f81d80a59ffb89f2f0abe6bc065585bd79edce058c5","dweb:/ipfs/QmNNmCbX9NjPXKqHJN8R1WC2rNeZSQrPZLd6FF6AKLyH5Y"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/SafeCast.sol":{"keccak256":"0xc8cae21c9ae4a46e5162ff9bf5b351d6fa6a6eba72d515f3bc1bdfeda7fdf083","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ce830ebcf28e31643caba318996db3763c36d52cd0f23798ba83c135355d45e9","dweb:/ipfs/QmdGPcvptHN7UBCbUYBbRX3hiRVRFLRwno8b4uga6uFNif"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/SignedMath.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb1970fac7b64e6c09611e6691791e848d5e3fe410fa5899e7df2e0afd77a99e3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://db5fbb3dddd8b7047465b62575d96231ba8a2774d37fb4737fbf23340fabbb03","dweb:/ipfs/QmVUSvooZKEdEdap619tcJjTLcAuH6QBdZqAzWwnAXZAWJ"]},"src/BlindNegotiation.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7421f5e0194460ff263281fb6245daf77f73394c34474a5801257f51b75b27ec","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://7da27c7f00deee6271cb33307a99d76dec6f88a267e858511654d573596bc4aa","dweb:/ipfs/QmcWn4KZ7dz86TzokgJ85P9eHdFRWLeJFJcKzg5P8oV7L2"]}},"version":1}

params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which room expires

getEncryptedResult(bytes32).details: Only callable by room parties. Returns the ciphertext handles      that the client SDK uses with decryptForView() or decryptForTx().

getPublishedResult(bytes32).details: Called by ConfidentialEscrow.settleEscrow() to trustlessly read      the FHE comparison result without any manual input.      Returns (false, false, 0) if result has not been published yet.

returns.agreedPrice: The decrypted midpoint price (0 if no match).
returns.matched: Whether the FHE comparison found an overlap.

getReceivedInvites(address).details: Called by the frontend when user connects wallet to show their inbox.

joinAndCompute(bytes32,(uint256,uint8,ui.details: Core FHE circuit:   1. FHE.gte(ceiling, floor)      — compare in encrypted space   2. FHE.add(floor, ceiling)      — sum in encrypted space   3. FHE.div(sum, euint64(2))     — midpoint in encrypted space   4. FHE.select(match, mid, 0)    — conditional in ciphertext CRITICAL: Neither price is ever in cleartext at any point.

publishResult(bytes32,bool,uint64).details: Called after decryptForTx returns {decryptedValue, signature}.      The caller passes the result here via FHE.publishDecryptResult().

sendInvite(bytes32,address).details: The invite is stored on-chain so the recipient sees it when they      connect their wallet. No external messaging service needed.

params.recipient: The wallet address of the counterparty
params.roomId: The room to invite the counterparty to

createRoom(bytes32,(uint256,uint8,uint8,.notice: Party A creates a room with their encrypted floor price.

getEncryptedResult(bytes32).notice: Get encrypted handles for client-side decryptForView.

getPublishedResult(bytes32).notice: Returns the published result for the ConfidentialEscrow contract.

getReceivedInviteCount(address).notice: Get the count of received invites for an address.

getReceivedInvites(address).notice: Get all invites received by an address.

getSentInviteCount(address).notice: Get the count of sent invites for an address.

getSentInvites(address).notice: Get all invites sent by an address.

joinAndCompute(bytes32,(uint256,uint8,ui.notice: Party B joins and triggers the blind comparison.

sendInvite(bytes32,address).notice: Send an on-chain invite to a counterparty.
